_publications._publicationTitle: Electrical stimulation of Schwann cells on electrospun hyaluronic acid carbon nanotube fibers.

_contextSnippet: WT SC are rounder and tend to cluster...Cellular proliferation was highest for WT SC at 100 mV/mm stimulation
details: WT SC are more rounded and tend to cluster, with cellular proliferation highest at 100 mV/mm stimulation
